## Summary

<!-- Describe what changed and why. Link the related issue if applicable: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component
- [ ] Enhancement to existing component/package
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes with no errors
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm check` (Biome) passes with no warnings
- [ ] Added / updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated Storybook story if a component was added or changed
- [ ] Updated the playground (`apps/playground`) if a component was added or changed
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) for any package that changed public API
